steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The verb “belonged” requires a preposition to form a complete prepositional phrase, and Ochus subvittatus is the specific proper noun serving as its object—a formal species identification.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
A colon introduces a formal identification or elaboration. “To:” correctly uses the colon to introduce the species identification. The other choices violate this convention by using a semicolon, adding an unnecessary word, or omitting punctuation.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
